headline: Old Age space ETFs gain over New Age stocks since SpaceX IPO
summary: SpaceX's (SPCX) IPO may be creating a vacuum, and space-themed ETFs are benefitting from the latest phase in the Space Race. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre looks at the array of thematic space ETFs and how they have been gaining since SpaceX's mega-IPO last Friday.

headline: Huntington Ingalls Delivers First REMUS 130 UUV to U.S. Ally
summary: HII delivers its first REMUS 130 UUV to a U.S. ally, expanding its autonomous maritime systems reach as UUV demand is set to rise.
